# ARCHERZ

> Association of Computer Science & Technology Students at Government Polytechnic College Attingal. Workshops, events, and a student community building the next generation of developers.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of ARCHERZ — manifesto, workshops, flagship events, team, and roadmap.
- [Workshops](/#workshops): Current workshop tracks offered by the association.
- [Events](/#events): Flagship events including the Mini Militia tournament.
- [Team](/#team): The core team behind ARCHERZ.
- [Contact](/#contact): Get in touch with the ARCHERZ team.
